formal_definition: A platform operator providing services for the sale or purchase of virtual assets, regulated in Hong Kong under a dual regime combining the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) and the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (Cap. 615).
plain_definition: A centralised exchange where people can buy, sell, or trade cryptocurrencies and other virtual assets -- broadly the crypto-industry equivalent of a stock exchange, but privately operated. Platforms serving Hong Kong investors must be licensed by the Securities and Futures Commission.
